text: A street scene in a sunny, arid location. A large, modern building with a corrugated metal facade and several closed metal roll-down doors dominates the background. A brown hatchback car is parked on the left. In the foreground, a man with a beard and headphones is visible, holding a small device. A utility pole with tangled wires stands near the center. To the right, there is a low concrete wall, a green building, and dense foliage.
label: Image
